title: poa supina subsp. foucaudii
intro: Poa supina subsp. foucaudii is a sub-species of the Poa supina grass, a type of perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Poa supina subsp. foucaudii include its ability to alleviate digestive problems, reduce inflammation and pain, and improve respiratory issues. This plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
